tasks.label: cmake-build
args: subst Q: /d >nul 2>nul & subst Q: ${workspaceFolder} && call "D:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\Common7\Tools\VsDevCmd.bat" -arch=x64 && set "PATH=D:\Qt\6.11.0\msvc2022_64\bin;!PATH!" && "D:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" --fresh -S Q:/ -B Q:/out/build/debug -G "Visual Studio 18 2026" -A x64 -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=D:/Qt/6.11.0/msvc2022_64 && "D:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" --build Q:/out/build/debug --config Debug & set "RC=!ERRORLEVEL!" & subst Q: /d >nul 2>nul & exit /b !RC!

tasks.label: cmake-clean-build
args: subst Q: /d >nul 2>nul & subst Q: ${workspaceFolder} && (if exist "Q:\out\build\debug" rmdir /s /q "Q:\out\build\debug") && call "D:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\Common7\Tools\VsDevCmd.bat" -arch=x64 && set "PATH=D:\Qt\6.11.0\msvc2022_64\bin;!PATH!" && "D:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" --fresh -S Q:/ -B Q:/out/build/debug -G "Visual Studio 18 2026" -A x64 -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=D:/Qt/6.11.0/msvc2022_64 && "D:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" --build Q:/out/build/debug --config Debug & set "RC=!ERRORLEVEL!" & subst Q: /d >nul 2>nul & exit /b !RC!
